templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/loveshackfancy/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/loveshackfancy/

templates.name: Sizing (clothes)
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes generally run true to size. Please check our size chart here https://www.loveshackfancy.com/pages/size-chart

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.loveshackfancy.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@loveshackfancy.com or give us a call at 619-373-1543. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.loveshackfancy.com/pages/locations

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over 300$. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days. Once shipped it will take up to 7 business days.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@loveshackfancy.com or give us a call at 619-373-1543. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.loveshackfancy.com/search?q=sale&type=product

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customerservice@loveshackfancy.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 619-373-1543 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.loveshackfancy.com/pages/tracking?srsltid=AfmBOoo3BHeJpg9f3ef3_Ups4RaiTSXhvAdAhV3chagZFKPFaNFAA1g2&externalId=NyrHd
